mymod.upgrade.recharge.title: Turret Upgrade: Recharge Speed
mymod.upgrade.recharge.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.recharge.desc2: Effect: Reduces arrow firing cooldown by 0.25 seconds.
mymod.upgrade.speed.title: Turret Upgrade: Projectile Speed
mymod.upgrade.speed.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.invuln.title: Turret Defense: Hit Invulnerability
mymod.upgrade.invuln.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.invuln.desc2: Effect: Increases invulnerability frame by 1 sec when attacked.
mymod.upgrade.heal.title: Turret Defense: Self-Regeneration
mymod.upgrade.heal.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.heal.desc2: Effect: Regenerates health over time and improves level-up recovery.
mymod.upgrade.heal.success: Self-regeneration upgraded! (%s%% Max HP restored on Level-Up)
mymod.upgrade.xp_discount.title: Turret Training: Quick Study (50% Off)
mymod.upgrade.xp_discount.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.xp_discount.desc2: Effect: Cuts required XP for level-ups in half (rounded up).
mymod.upgrade.normal_pattern.title: Turret Tech: Single-Shot Restore
mymod.upgrade.normal_pattern.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.normal_pattern.desc2: Effect: Resets any spread/burst fire back to precise single shots.
mymod.upgrade.normal_pattern.success: Firing pattern reset to standard precise shots.
mymod.upgrade.fan.title: Turret Tech: Fan-Spread Fire
mymod.upgrade.fan.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.fan.desc2: Effect: Fires multiple arrows in a wide fan-shaped spread.
mymod.upgrade.burst.title: Turret Tech: Linear Burst Fire
mymod.upgrade.burst.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.burst.desc2: Effect: Fires arrows in rapid succession in a straight line.
mymod.upgrade.burst.info: Current Pattern ➔ Linear Burst Pattern (Requires 2 Tokens)
mymod.upgrade.burst.success: Firing pattern changed to Linear Burst!
mymod.upgrade.normal_gravity.title: Turret Tech: Gravity Restore
mymod.upgrade.normal_gravity.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.normal_gravity.desc2: Effect: Projectiles will fall naturally over time due to gravity.
mymod.upgrade.normal_gravity.info: Status: No Gravity ➔ Normal Gravity (Requires 1 Token)
mymod.upgrade.vacuum.title: Turret Tech: Gravity Negation
mymod.upgrade.vacuum.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.vacuum.desc2: Effect: Negates gravity, allowing arrows to fly straight forever.
mymod.upgrade.vacuum.info: Status: Normal Gravity ➔ Zero Gravity (Requires 2 Tokens)
mymod.upgrade.vacuum.success: Zero-gravity drive installed! Arrows fly in a straight line.
mymod.upgrade.normal_blocks.title: Turret Tech: Block Collision Restore
mymod.upgrade.normal_blocks.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.normal_blocks.desc2: Effect: Disables wall-penetration; arrows collide with blocks normally.
mymod.upgrade.normal_blocks.success: Collision restored. Arrows will stick into blocks.
mymod.upgrade.pass_blocks.title: Turret Tech: Phase-Shift Arrows (Wall Hack)
mymod.upgrade.pass_blocks.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.pass_blocks.desc2: Effect: Arrows pass through solid blocks and obstacles to hit targets.
mymod.upgrade.pass_blocks.success: Arrows now phase through solid obstacles!
mymod.upgrade.normal_sight.title: Turret Tech: Line-of-Sight Restore
mymod.upgrade.normal_sight.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.normal_sight.desc2: Effect: Restores normal vision; only attacks exposed targets.
mymod.upgrade.normal_sight.info: Status: X-Ray ➔ Line of Sight (Requires 1 Token)
mymod.upgrade.normal_sight.success: Sight normalized: Standard target acquisition applied.
mymod.upgrade.can_see_through_walls.titl: Turret Tech: X-Ray Sensors (Target Through Walls)
mymod.upgrade.can_see_through_walls.desc: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
Effect: Detects and aims at targets behind solid walls.
mymod.upgrade.can_see_through_walls.info: Status: Line of Sight ➔ X-Ray Sensors (Requires 3 Tokens)
mymod.upgrade.can_see_through_walls.succ: X-Ray sensors online! Targets behind walls will be aimed at.
mymod.upgrade.normal_arrow.title: Turret Alchemy: Pure Steel Arrows
mymod.upgrade.normal_arrow.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.normal_arrow.desc2: Effect: Resets all active potion effects back to clean normal arrows.
mymod.upgrade.normal_arrow.success: Weapon loaded with Standard Steel Arrows.
mymod.upgrade.poison.title: Turret Alchemy: Toxic Venom Coating
mymod.upgrade.poison.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.poison.desc2: Effect: Applies a deadly Poison effect to all fired arrows.
mymod.upgrade.poison.success: Weapon loaded with Toxic Poison Arrows.
mymod.upgrade.weakness.title: Turret Alchemy: Enfeebling Weakness
mymod.upgrade.weakness.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.weakness.desc2: Effect: Inflicts Weakness, significantly lowering enemy attack damage.
mymod.upgrade.slowness.title: Turret Alchemy: Cryo Slowness
mymod.upgrade.slowness.desc1: ■ Applied to this turret immediately upon purchase.
mymod.upgrade.slowness.desc2: Effect: Inflicts Slowness, heavily restricting enemy movement.
